leadText: The Tart Apple (Japanese: すっぱいりんご Sour Apple) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Applin to evolve into Flapple upon use. This consumes the Tart Apple.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Tart Apples are required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon GO. They are consumed upon use. Applin requires 200 Applin Candy and 20 Tart Apples to evolve into Flapple .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Hammerlocke Sw Event Hidden recurring item ( Axew's Eye Sw ) Wild Area News Sh (March 19 to March 25, 2020) Sw Sh IA Hidden recurring item ( Soothing Wetlands , Loop Lagoon ) S V Delibird Presents (after earning 3 Gym Badges ) Sparkling overworld item ( Tagtree Thicket ) S V TM Sparkling overworld item ( Apple Hills ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh The Isle of Armor promotion packs All June 5 to 11, 2020

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Tapping apples that appear near PokéStops can award either Tart Apples, Sweet Apples, or an encounter with a wild Applin. Apples will also have an increased chance of appearing at PokéStops with Mossy Lure Modules .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally tart.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally tart.
